prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UVBLACKLIGHT-BLK Product Type: FLASHLIGHT Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR 2 in 1 Portable UV Black Light White LED Flashlight Scorpion Light Lanyard Description: Need to verify a credit cards, IDs or passports? Then you need the ASR UV Black Light & LED Flashlight.

This handy device comes with a UV black light tube as well as a super bright white LED. You can easily use the UV light as a scorpion light to verify hidden security features. This light is ideal for checking minerals, blood trails and pet urine trails as well. It requires 4 AA batteries (not included) and comes with a lanyard so you can easily carry it when not in use. Search Terms: bouncing clubbing security law enforcement torchportable lightweight uv light blacklight lanyard emergency kits high quality pvc housing nylon convenient carry compact regular flashlight scorpion pocket size ultracompact design bag hidden security Features: - 2 in 1 Portable Black Light - Super Bright White LED Flashlight & UV Tube - Length: 6.25" - 365NM UV Wavelength - Requires 4 AA Batteries (Not Included) - Comes with Lanyard === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
